# rustfs_site_replication_metainfo (Data Source)

Reads RustFS local site replication metadata.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "rustfs_site_replication_metainfo" "example" {
  peer_state = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `buckets` (Boolean) Request bucket replication status.
- `entity` (String) Optional entity filter. Valid values are `bucket`, `policy`, `user`, `group`, and `ilm-expiry-rule`.
- `entity_value` (String) Optional entity value used with `entity`.
- `groups` (Boolean) Request IAM group replication status.
- `ilm_expiry_rules` (Boolean) Request ILM expiry rule replication status.
- `metrics` (Boolean) Request site replication metrics.
- `peer_state` (Boolean) Request peer state details.
- `policies` (Boolean) Request IAM policy replication status.
- `show_deleted` (Boolean) Request deleted entity information when supported by the server.
- `users` (Boolean) Request IAM user replication status.

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String) Site replication API version reported by RustFS.
- `deployment_id` (String) Local deployment ID reported by RustFS.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether RustFS reports site replication as enabled.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `name` (String) Local site name reported by RustFS.
- `raw_json` (String) Raw JSON response body returned by the RustFS admin API.
- `site` (Attributes List) Sites currently reported by RustFS site replication. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--site))

<a id="nestedatt--site"></a>
### Nested Schema for `site`

Read-Only:

- `api_version` (String) Site replication API version reported by RustFS.
- `default_bandwidth_limit` (Number) Default bandwidth limit per bucket in bytes per second.
- `default_bandwidth_set` (Boolean) Whether a default bandwidth limit is set.
- `default_bandwidth_updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for the last bandwidth setting update.
- `deployment_id` (String) Immutable RustFS deployment ID for the site.
- `endpoint` (String) Site endpoint.
- `name` (String) Site name.
- `object_naming_mode` (String) Object naming mode reported by RustFS.
- `replicate_ilm_expiry` (Boolean) Whether ILM expiry replication is enabled for the site.
- `sync_state` (String) Synchronous replication state for the site.
- `tables_replica_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the site is acting as a tables replica site.
